label: OpenRouter
description: AI language model completion through OpenRouter. Works out of the box with platform credits (default: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6). Model, system prompt, sampling parameters, and API key all come from a wired OpenRouterConfig node; without one, the defaults apply.

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.description: The prompt to send to the LLM

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Optional OpenRouterConfig node carrying ALL settings (model, system prompt, parameters, key). Unwired, the defaults apply.

inputs.name: parseJson
inputs.label: Parse JSON
inputs.description: Parse and repair JSON from the response (changes output to Dict).

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: LLM response. Declare type in Weft: String without parseJson, or Dict/JsonDict with parseJson. With parseJson, you can also add custom output ports to extract specific JSON keys directly.
